item.title: TIL CO2 is gay?
item.description: This was in the comments of a video of a plumber using a CO2 cartridge to clear a water line. Other things that are now gay because of CO2: Beer Fire extinguishers Dry Ice Human respiratory system

item.title: I'm really tired, hoss

item.title: Memes vol 248
item.description:
Milf (moth I’d like to fuck)
Or tap shoes
I should call her
Yes YES
I am utterly terrified of hippos
I called my hot friend a himbo yesterday (it’s because he is one)
I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry I’m sorry
I like how it says “pearls” when those are very clearly balls
Why did I save this
My mouth is a sports car (AUTO CORRECT TRIED TO PUT MOTHER OMG)
It’s me I was the kid who left the lights on
I saved this for my roommate because I don’t like coffee- but I love miss piggy
Hell yeah
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax
Coricopat tax- I do have another cat… I guess I just don’t take as many pictures of Tantomile
Nessie tax

item.title: At this years gender reveal party I shall be revealing new genders. They shall destroy currently existing genders. There will be no mercy. But there will be cake.
item.dc:creator: algavinn

item.title: Cold Weather Dump
item.description:
Monkey brain is gonna solve problems like monkey.
Low on dopamine get the pokeamine.
My mother and sister are both RNs and nursing stories are always entertaining.
Reject society. Go feral.
You're "what does this face mean" autism test won't work on me as I have had to memorise every facial expression and emotional response to survive for the last 30 years.
I just really related to this panel and had to save it on my phone.
"A well trained team of professional clowns could run this place more efficiently than you." Is a brutal and supreme insult.
Anyone else grow up on a farm? This is hilariously real.
I think stupid cat videos speak for themselves.
Spaniel jowls are precious.
..... package?
Do you know how much time and energy it takes to hide the fact that I am at best a semi domesticated goblin?!
I love new places and experiences as long as there are no expectations on me.
The word "embrace" is doing a lot of heavy lifting here.
Sounds like a panic at the disco song.
Polyamory: because you are too much work for one petson.
This is the best kind of absurd humor.
markmedownasscaredandhorny.gif
Just a bunch of silly little guys.
A pygmy goat headbutt-ed me into a large hole our dog dug in the yard when I was a young child.
The ... is a powerful force.
Never could keep a tamagotchi alive.
I am very good at entertaining drunk people in shuttle busses. This is a very specific and useless talent.
And I don't want the world to see me cuz I don't think that they'd understand.....
Your sarumom jokes.
Feel free to use dubious widget face to express doubt when necessary.
This is Whiskey trying to fit her whole self in my hand.
She's seen some shit.
Toe beans!
item.dc:creator: Jamceratops

item.dc:creator: thewillofsaga

item.title: New day, new declined job applications.
item.description: I'm losing my mind. Day 210 since I finished my studies. Ove a hundred job applications... Lost count. Eight job interviews. One accepted my application for a summer job last year. Nothing more. No full time hire after the season. False promises. Nothing to live off. Savings soon spent. The replies are always the same. I can't get the job because I don't have enough experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. But I don't get the job because I don't have experience. And I can only get experience through a job. Give me job plz. Can I Haz job plis. Hey b0ss. Gimme job plz. B0ss. Hey b0ss. GIMMIE job. HEY B0SS. B0SS. A JOB PLIZZZZ. PLEASE. HEY B0SS. CAN I HAZ JOB PLEASE. CAN I HAS JOB, B0SS. HEY B0SS! CAN I HAZ JOB?! JOB PLEASE! HEY B0SS! CAN I HAZ JOB PLZZZZZZZ?!?! Education was wasted. My life is wasted. I don't know how long I can continue this mess. Good night, soon.
item.dc:creator: BartemiusTheBroken
